description: Configurable label model for sources, candidate pool items, reports, topics and future domains.
core_rule: Labels are configured once and attached generically. Do not hard-code a separate label field set per workspace or per source type.

ai_sql_categories.purpose: The 10 first-level labels required by the current company SQL export.

rules: Source configuration pages may choose label sets and default label rules.
Candidate pool pages should display labels attached to the dedupe winner and its group.
Company SQL export must map adopted daily report items to config/taxonomy/news_categories.json until the internal platform supports broader taxonomies.
Adding hardware or semiconductor labels should add a label set or domain pack, not new columns.
